calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Jeffrey T. Thayer of Hawkins, Parnell & Young LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-766-3204
appearing for the Defendants;
No other appearance on the matter.

Ruling - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants FCA US LLC and Kathy Fowler Chrysler Jeep Dodge Inc.'s motion to change venue is granted. The case is transferred to Orange County and plaintiff Pamela Salsedo shall pay all required transfer fees. There is no basis for venue in San Francisco. Ms. Salsedo admits that she erroneously believed that FCA did not designate a principal business address in California and could be sued in any county. FCA did designate an Orange County business address. The case is transferred to Orange County rather than Lake County because that is the county that FCA designated per CCP 398(b).
Order signed in open court. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
